summary: Preservia MVP end-to-end tested. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass (auth, calculators, cases CRUD, user isolation, calculations on case, notes, PDF report). Frontend: full mobile E2E flow succeeded via web preview — register -> cases empty state -> create case -> detail hub segmented tabs -> volume calc -> save to case -> note -> generate PDF (download triggered) -> logout via Perfil tab -> login again with test@preservia.com. Google auth endpoint verified to exist and reject invalid session_id (401); full Google OAuth loop cannot be automated. No blocking issues found. Two minor RN-Web deprecation warnings and one expo-file-system/legacy import to flag.

react_native_issues.issue: Uses deprecated legacy API path 'expo-file-system/legacy' in /app/frontend/app/case/[id].tsx:18. Migrate to the new expo-file-system v19 API (writeAsStringAsync moved to new namespace) before it is removed.

React Native Web warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Origin: FAB style in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx:255-260 (shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset). Non-blocking on native, but web console prints the warning.

React Native Web warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Origin is likely inside a library (safe-area-context / gesture-handler) so may be transitive; verify after next Expo minor upgrade.

action_items: Migrate away from 'expo-file-system/legacy' import in app/case/[id].tsx to the current expo-file-system API to avoid future breakage.
Replace shadow* props with boxShadow on the FAB (and any other places) to silence the RN-Web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 538-line module. It is still under the 700-line ceiling but is close; consider splitting into modules (auth, cases, notes, pdf) as it grows.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded everywhere via projection {"_id": 0} and case_public(). Good.
Auth: bcrypt hashing + JWT with 30-day expiry via Authorization: Bearer header — clean.
PDF endpoint returns base64 JSON as specified; header verified as '%PDF' in tests.
Frontend: all URLs come from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; no hardcoded values.
All interactive elements carry testID; tabs (Casos/Perfil) render correctly at 390x844 mobile viewport.
seed_data_creation: Two ephemeral users test_a_<uuid>@preservia.com and test_b_<uuid>@preservia.com created per pytest run for user-isolation checks; case fully deleted at end. Also one ephemeral UI user e2e_<uuid>@preservia.com from Playwright run (its case+note remain in DB and can be pruned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_preservia_api.py — 25 tests covering auth (incl. duplicate 400, bad-password 401, no-token 401, invalid Google session 401), calculators (volume/lbm-male/lbm-female/concentration + 400 edges), cases CRUD, user isolation (user B gets 404 on user A's case), calc-on-case + delete, notes add/list/delete, PDF report (base64 decodes to '%PDF' header, >1KB). Reuse the same file for regression. Frontend testIDs are consistent: login-*, register-*, new-case-fab, case-name-input, tab-calc/notes/report, open-calc-<type>, calc-input-<key>, calc-compute-button, calc-save-button, note-text-input, save-note-button, generate-report-button, logout-button.
rca_of_issue: No bug reproduced. Only style-level deprecation warnings surfaced from React Native Web.
